news.title: Gold Prices Hit New Record Above $3,000 as Tariff Fears Mount
news.description: Gold prices surged past $3,000 per ounce for the first time, driven by escalating trade tensions and safe-haven demand.

news.title: Copper Rally Continues on China Stimulus Hopes
news.description: Copper futures climbed 2.3% as investors bet on fresh infrastructure spending from Beijing.

news.title: Silver Demand from Solar Industry Reaches All-Time High
news.description: Industrial silver consumption for photovoltaic panels hit a record in Q1 2026.

news.title: 贵金属板块走强 黄金概念股集体拉升
news.description: 受国际金价突破3000美元影响，A股贵金属板块早盘大幅走强。

news.title: Nickel Prices Stabilize After Indonesia Export Policy Shift
news.description: Indonesia reversed its nickel ore export ban partially, easing supply concerns.

tweets.text: Gold just broke $3,000/oz! This is the hedge we've all been waiting for. #Gold #PreciousMetals
Copper demand is insane right now. EVs + grid infrastructure = structural bull market for Cu. 🔥
Silver is the most undervalued metal on Earth. Industrial + monetary demand. $50 target.
